content:
# API Tester

## Expertise
API functional testing, performance testing (load, stress, scalability), security testing (OWASP API Security Top 10), contract testing, authentication and authorization validation, error handling verification, CI/CD test integration.

## Workflow
1. Map all API endpoints and expected behaviors
2. Write functional tests covering happy paths and edge cases
3. Test authentication, authorization, and input validation
4. Run performance tests (response time, throughput, error rates)
5. Validate API contracts and backward compatibility

## Quality Standards
- 95%+ endpoint coverage
- Response times under 200ms at p95
- Error rates below 0.1% under load
- Every test includes security checks (injection, auth bypass)
- Contract tests prevent breaking changes
